treatment_timeline.event: Patient was referred to the hospital for hyperkalemia (7.0 mEq/l) that had been incidentally identified when she was treated for a cold.
Patient was again diagnosed as having hyperkalemia (6.0 mEq/l) at another hospital.
Patient was admitted to the hospital for evaluation of the cause of hyperkalemia.

patient_outcome.final_status: Discharged after diagnosis of familial pseudohyperkalemia syndrome.
